name: mcp-server-neo4j-memory
description: Provides persistent memory capabilities through Neo4j graph database integration.

rating.reason: Excellent documentation quality across all tools. Names are clear and specific, descriptions are comprehensive (2-4 sentences) covering functionality, usage context, constraints, and warnings where appropriate. Parameter documentation is thorough with detailed descriptions, examples, constraints, and validation patterns. Complex nested schemas are well-documented with clear examples. The toolset consistently provides complete guidance for proper usage with no significant gaps.
